violations.text: A small amount of old rodent droppings were observed in the dry storage area. Area to be cleaned and sanitized. If there are any additional droppings, report to pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Air gap handout provided to PIC. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025
The facility is lacking thermo-labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023

The sink used for food preparation is lacking a proper air gap (currently equipped with an Air Break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
The floor and wall junctures in the kitchen do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
